configs.purpose: bounded recalc tracker and coordinator transition model covering dirty, needed, evaluating, cycle-blocked, verified-clean, publish-ready, rejected-pending-repair, candidate intake, rejection, accepted-candidate publication, and tracker publication clearing

semantic_equivalence_statement: This run checks bounded TLA model evidence only. It does not change recalc tracker behavior, coordinator behavior, dependency graph construction, invalidation, evaluation order, working-value reads, TraceCalc behavior, TreeCalc/CoreEngine behavior, publication semantics, rejection policy, OxFml/OxFunc behavior, pack decisions, or service readiness.
